zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：震荡整理偏空迹象
zh.content:
当前以太坊价格在1666.22附近小幅波动，日内涨幅仅0.08%，显示市场短期缺乏明确方向。从价格区间1664.41-1666.23来看，多空力量基本均衡，呈现震荡整理格局。短期趋势偏向弱势，投资者需谨慎操作。  

技术指标方面，20日简单移动平均线(SMA20)位于1668.43之上，价格略低于均线，显示空方略占优势。MACD值为5.38592，但缺乏信号线参考，短线动能不强，整体动量趋缓。若后续价格持续低于SMA20，空头压力可能增强。  

支撑位关注1664-1665一线，若跌破此区域，可能加速下探至1658附近。阻力位则在1668-1670，若价格突破该区间，则有望重回上行通道。短线交易者可依据支撑/阻力进行区间操作，避免追涨杀跌。  

交易建议上，偏向观望和轻仓操作。多头应等待价格稳守SMA20上方并伴随成交量放大信号；空头则可在回落至阻力区间遇阻时尝试短线布局。同时，风险控制至关重要，止损可参考支撑下方3-5美元。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum is trading near 1666.22, showing an exceptionally tight intraday range between 1664.41 and 1666.23. The modest 24-hour gain of 0.08% suggests a market in consolidation rather than a decisive trend phase. Price is currently sitting slightly below the 20-period simple moving average at 1668.43, indicating that short-term momentum remains neutral to mildly bearish. Unless buyers reclaim and hold above the moving average, upside progress may remain limited in the immediate term.

The available momentum indicators provide a mixed picture. While RSI data is unavailable, the MACD reading of 5.39 remains positive, implying that underlying bullish momentum has not fully disappeared. However, without the corresponding signal line, confirmation of a fresh bullish crossover cannot be established. This creates a scenario where momentum appears constructive beneath the surface, but price action has yet to demonstrate sufficient strength to validate a stronger upward move.

From a technical perspective, the nearest support zone lies around 1664.00, closely aligned with the session low. A break below this level could expose additional downside toward the 1660.00 area, where buyers may attempt to stabilize the market. On the upside, resistance is developing near the SMA(20) at 1668.43, followed by the psychologically important 1670.00 region. A sustained move above these levels would improve the short-term outlook and could attract additional buying interest.

For traders, patience may be preferable until a clearer directional signal emerges. Aggressive bulls may consider long positions only after a confirmed breakout above 1668–1670 with increasing volume and momentum. Conversely, short-term bearish opportunities may appear if support at 1664 fails decisively. Given the compressed trading range and lack of confirmation from multiple indicators, risk management remains critical, with tight stop-loss placement and disciplined position sizing recommended until volatility expands and trend direction becomes clearer.
